title: Soterios

'''Soterios''' was a dry [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Melantha Province]]. Most of the world was scoured by windswept canyons and vast expanses of wastelands. There were few [[City/Legends|settlements]] and the indigenous flora and fauna had been driven to extinction by [[Species/Legends|species]] introduced from elsewhere in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Description==
Soterios was an ash-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in a tight [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around a single [[Star/Legends|star]]. It was a terrestrial world with a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and a hot, arid climate. Most of the planet's surface was taken up by dry land dominated by vast desert wastelands and windswept canyons, with the remainder consisting of salty, shallow seas. In spite of a slight [[Ammonia/Legends|ammonia]] content, these seas supported a variety of unusual [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="LE" />

Soterios's economy was mostly based off-planet. [[House Melantha]] governed the world and generated income from companies based in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. In this capacity, Soterios put up [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in the form of loans and generated revenue on interest. Soterios also attracted some out-of-[[Sector/Legends|sector]] companies with attractive profit-sharing plans and cheap leasing on desert land.<ref name="LE" />

==Locations==
Soterios's cities, including its capital of [[Melaana]], were located in canyon basins that were the remnants of [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]]. These were connected by dry riverbed canyons used as a highway system for [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] and [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]]. The numerous loops and dead ends in this system made it nearly impossible for an off-worlder to navigate it without a guide. The topography was suitable for several [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] road rallies held annually. The cities had thriving theater districts, music halls, museums, and other cultural attractions. Soterios had an active professional sports circuit that was popular with [[House Melantha]] nobility and commoners alike.<ref name="LE" />

==Inhabitants==
Soterios had a population of 6.7 billion, including [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and many other species from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The planet's culture was also largely assimilated from the Core, especially [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The social scene was dominated by [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] media, which was viewed by natives as a source of information, a voice for the people, and an educational tool.<ref name="LE" />
